transcript: Speaker A: हा सीन इंग्लिश मध्ये कसा सांगशील? [How would you say this scene in English?] Speaker B: Man is making food fastly. Speaker C: हे पूर्णपणे चुकीचे नाही पण थोडं बेटर असं म्हणू शकतो. An energetic vendor aggressively mixes various ingredients into a snack with high-intensity movements. [This is not completely wrong, but we can say it a bit better. An energetic vendor aggressively mixes various ingredients into a snack with high-intensity movements.] Speaker B: मला English चांगलं येत नाही. [I don't know English well.] Speaker C: काही हरकत नाही. AI teacher ट्राय केलास का? [No problem. Have you tried the AI teacher?] Speaker B: पण ते महाग असतील ना? [But they must be expensive, right?] Speaker C: अजिबात नाही. नॉर्मल इंग्लिश क्लासेस पेक्षा ७ पट स्वस्त आहे. म्हणून १ कोटी लोक MySivi वर इंग्लिश प्रॅक्टिस करत आहेत. [Not at all. It is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 1 crore people are practicing English on MySivi.] Speaker B: पण टाईम मिळत नाही. [But I don't get time.] Speaker C: रोज फक्त १५-२० मिनिटं प्रॅक्टिस पुरेशी आहे. हळूहळू तू कॉन्फिडेंटली इंग्लिश बोलायला लागशील. [Just 15-20 minutes of practice daily is enough. Gradually you will start speaking English confidently.] Speaker B: कसं जॉईन करू? [How do I join?] Speaker C: इन्स्टॉल बटनावर क्लिक कर, MySivi ॲप इन्स्टॉल कर, साईन अप कर आणि प्रॅक्टिस सुरू कर. फक्त १५ दिवसात इम्प्रूव्हमेंट दिसायला लागेल. आत्ताच सुरू कर. [Click on the install button, install the MySivi app, sign up, and start practicing. You will start seeing improvement in just 15 days. Start now.]

summary: An AI avatar corrects a man's basic English description of a street food vendor, demonstrating how to speak more naturally and dynamically. The man expresses concerns about cost and time, which the AI addresses by highlighting that the MySivi app is 7 times cheaper than traditional classes and requires only 15-20 minutes of daily practice. The ad concludes with a call-to-action to install the app and start practicing to see results in 15 days.
